content:
# Brinell

**Summary**: A mechanical test used to measure the hardness of materials by determining the depth of an indentation made by a spherical indenter.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022]] used Brinell hardness tests to quantify the resistance of rocks to deformation after chemical treatment.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Hardness of limestone and chalk samples increased by 17% and 21% respectively under ZnSO4 treatment. ([[2022-samarkin|Samarkin, 2022, p. 56]])
